title: 3D Ultimate
description: Changes a few Items & Blocks to 3D
body:
# I will be taking a break from making 3D models for a while as I have other things in Life to do.

This Resource Pack mainly focuses on 3D Items and Blocks. Some of the Textures and Models weren't made by me but I asked the Original Creators (located in the credits.txt) for their Permission.

My Goal with this Texturepack:\
I used to get multiple Resourcepacks to change a few items, as an example; I got the 3D Ladders, 3D Rails and 3D Bookshelf texturepack, just for a few Blocks I already got 3 Resourcepacks. That's why I am making this Resourcepack, so I can have a single Resourcepack for multiple Items & Blocks. These are all of the Items & Blocks this Resourcepack changes:
<details>
<summary>Current Items in 3D</summary>

# Weapons
* Mace
* Every type of Sword
* Crossbow
* Bow
* Trident (Item)

# Tools

* Every type of tool
* Fishing Rod
* Spyglass (Item)
* Brush
* Shears

# Blocks

* Rails 
* Copper Bulbs
* Ladder
* Fungus, Mushroom, Flowers
* Crops
* Bookshelf & Chiseled Bookshelf
* Dripstone
* Crafting Table, Smithing Table, Fletching Table, Loom

# Items

* Book and Quill, unenchanted & enchanted Books
* Armor Trims
* Egg, Snowball
* Both Trial Keys
* Every Spawn egg


</details>


<details>
<summary>Coming Soon</summary>

# Blocks

* Redstone Lamp, Sea Lantern
* Skeleton Skull, Wither Skeleton Skull
* End Portal Frame
* Furnace, Smoker, Blast Furnace
* Enchanting Table
* Glass panes
* Redstone Torch
* Barrel

# Items

* Slime ball
* Brick, Nether Brick
* Pufferfish (Item)
* Spider Eyes
* Buckets (excluding fish varients at the moment)
* Potions (I will add more and more Potions over time, because making every potion at once takes time)
* Ender Pearl, Eye of Ender
* Compass, Recovery Compass
* The 1.21 Armor Trims
* Nametag
* Lead
* Fire Charge
* Banner Patterns

</details>


I will try to update this Resourcepack every few days, so if you have Questions, Ideas or 3D Models, feel free to contact me on Discord, tatakei.
